title: Davie Clothing Pty Ltd (trading as "Oodie") — Public safety
investigation_objective: Davie Clothing Pty Ltd, trading as Oodie, paid $101,280 after the ACCC issued six infringement notices for failing to attach mandatory high fire-danger warning labels to six styles of Kids Beach Oodie under the children's nightwear safety standard, covering roughly 2,400 units sold between September 2022 and July 2023. The company gave a court-enforceable undertaking and issued a voluntary recall; it has separately been issued a further ACCC infringement notice over button-battery warning failures.
scope: Paid $101,280 over six ACCC infringement notices for missing mandatory fire-danger warning labels on children's products; Subject of a separate ACCC button-battery infringement notice; Issued a voluntary product recall
